title: Hiring Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Asian Paints Signature Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
